arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user hierarchy group.

hierarchy_group_id.description: The unique identifier of the user hierarchy group.

hierarchy_path.description: The structure representing the levels in the hierarchy path of the user group.

id.description: The ID of the user hierarchy group.

level_id.description: The ID representing the specific level in the hierarchy group.

name.description: The name of the user hierarchy group.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the user hierarchy group.
